title: KeepModdedInventory
description: A add-on for Luna's Keep Inventory to add support for several mods!
body:
This is an addon for [Luna's Keep Inventory](https://modrinth.com/datapack/lunas-keep-inventory) which adds support for the following mods:
- Nature's compass
- Explorer's compass
- Comforts
- Travelers Backpack
- Create

If you want any other mods to be added leave an issue on github!
